transcription.text: I fell in love with you the first time I looked into them, their eyes. And you have a certain little cute way of flirting with them, their eyes. Sparkle, bubble, get you in a whole lot of trouble. I'm looking for the boy with the whisper light.

segments.text: I fell in love with you the first time I looked into them, their eyes.
And you have a certain little cute way of flirting with them, their eyes.
Sparkle, bubble, get you in a whole lot of trouble.
I'm looking for the boy with the whisper light.
